product_key: # Plum receipt — provenance of the rows above

product_number: SELECT product_key, product_number, product_name, category, subcategory, product_line, revenue, units_sold, orders, customers FROM gold.v_product_performance f ORDER BY revenue DESC, product_key ASC LIMIT %s
orders is not additive across products (one order can hold several products).
top_n=10: more segments/rows may exist beyond the returned set; any segment_sum covers the returned rows only.
